skipped.message: Reason: distribution initializes with short validation error ('test-examples.R:145:9')

testcase.name: e2e_tm_g_scatterplotmatrix_Initializes_without_errors

error.message: Error in `app_initialize(self, private, app_dir = app_dir, ..., load_timeout = load_timeout, timeout = timeout, wait = wait, expect_values_screenshot_args = expect_values_screenshot_args, screenshot_args = screenshot_args, check_names = check_names, name = name, variant = variant, view = view, height = height, width = width, seed = seed, clean_logs = clean_logs, shiny_args = shiny_args, render_args = render_args, options = options)`: Shiny app did not become stable in 120000ms. ('test-shinytest2-tm_g_scatterplotmatrix.R:50:3')

testcase.error:
Error in `app_initialize(self, private, app_dir = app_dir, ..., load_timeout = load_timeout, timeout = timeout, wait = wait, expect_values_screenshot_args = expect_values_screenshot_args, screenshot_args = screenshot_args, check_names = check_names, name = name, variant = variant, view = view, height = height, width = width, seed = seed, clean_logs = clean_logs, shiny_args = shiny_args, render_args = render_args, options = options)`: Shiny app did not become stable in 120000ms.
